# Omechu (오메추)

> Personalized food and restaurant recommendation web app for Korean users.

## Summary
- Recommends menus based on user preference, mood, budget, and context.
- Provides random recommendation and menu battle flows for quick decision making.
- Shows nearby restaurant context through map-assisted search.

## Key URLs
- https://omechu.log8.kr/mainpage
- https://omechu.log8.kr/mainpage/question-answer/1
- https://omechu.log8.kr/mainpage/result
- https://omechu.log8.kr/random-recommend
- https://omechu.log8.kr/menu-battle

## Dynamic URL templates
- Result detail template: https://omechu.log8.kr/mainpage/result/{menuId}
- Random detail template: https://omechu.log8.kr/random-recommend/{menuId}
- Battle play template: https://omechu.log8.kr/menu-battle/play/{id}

## Machine-readable resources
- OpenAPI: https://omechu.log8.kr/openapi.json
- AI Plugin manifest: https://omechu.log8.kr/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Sitemap: https://omechu.log8.kr/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://omechu.log8.kr/robots.txt

## Auth and access
- End-user features may require login.
- No public write API is provided for anonymous clients.

## Contact
- Site: https://omechu.log8.kr
- Team: OMECHU Team
